panels.description: Paid orders placed since local midnight (Europe/Zurich).

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM "order" WHERE created_at >= (date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Zurich') AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Zurich') AND status = 'paid';

panels.title: Orders today

panels.description: Sum of payments taken since local midnight, excluding GRATIS_* methods.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount_cents), 0) / 100.0 AS value FROM order_payment WHERE paid_at >= (date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Zurich') AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Zurich') AND method::text NOT LIKE 'GRATIS_%';

panels.title: Revenue today

panels.description: Share of orders that reached `paid` status over the last hour (paid / (paid + cancelled)).

targets.rawSql: SELECT 100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'paid')::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS value FROM "order" WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND status IN ('paid', 'cancelled');

panels.title: Payment success (1h)

panels.description: Share of non-5xx responses over the last 24h. Parses `status` from backend JSON logs.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| extend status = toint(extract(@'"status"\s*[:=]\s*(\d+)', 1, Log_s))
| where isnotnull(status)
| summarize total = count(), errors = countif(status >= 500)
| extend uptime_pct = iff(total == 0, 100.0, 100.0 - 100.0 * todouble(errors) / todouble(total))
| project uptime_pct

panels.title: Uptime 24h

panels.description: 95th percentile backend request latency over the last 5 minutes. Parses `latency_ms` from backend logs.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(10m)
| where ContainerAppName_s startswith "backend-"
| extend latency_ms = todouble(extract(@'"latency_ms"\s*[:=]\s*([\d\.]+)', 1, Log_s))
| where isnotnull(latency_ms)
| summarize p95 = percentile(latency_ms, 95) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: p95 latency (5m)

panels.description: Share of 5xx responses over the last 5 minutes. Parses `status` from backend logs.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(10m)
| extend status = toint(extract(@'"status"\s*[:=]\s*(\d+)', 1, Log_s))
| where isnotnull(status)
| summarize total = count(), errors = countif(status >= 500) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)
| extend error_rate = iff(total == 0, 0.0, 100.0 * todouble(errors) / todouble(total))
| project TimeGenerated, error_rate
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: 5xx error rate (5m)

panels.description: Revenue per hour from non-GRATIS payments over the selected range.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(paid_at, 1h),
  COALESCE(SUM(amount_cents), 0) / 100.0 AS "CHF"
FROM order_payment
WHERE $__timeFilter(paid_at)
  AND method::text NOT LIKE 'GRATIS_%'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Revenue by hour

panels.description: Share of order payments by method over the selected range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT method::text AS metric, COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM order_payment WHERE $__timeFilter(paid_at) GROUP BY method ORDER BY value DESC;

panels.title: Payment methods

panels.description: Paid orders split by origin (shop vs pos) over the selected range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT origin::text AS metric, COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM "order" WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND status = 'paid' GROUP BY origin;

panels.title: Orders by origin

panels.description: Top 15 products by units sold in the selected range. Paid orders only.

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.name AS product, SUM(ol.quantity)::bigint AS units FROM order_line ol JOIN "order" o ON o.id = ol.order_id JOIN product p ON p.id = ol.product_id WHERE $__timeFilter(o.created_at) AND o.status = 'paid' GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY units DESC LIMIT 15;

panels.title: Top products by units sold

panels.description: Top 15 products by gross revenue in the selected range. Paid orders only.

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.name AS product, (SUM(ol.quantity * ol.unit_price_cents) / 100.0)::numeric(12,2) AS chf FROM order_line ol JOIN "order" o ON o.id = ol.order_id JOIN product p ON p.id = ol.product_id WHERE $__timeFilter(o.created_at) AND o.status = 'paid' GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY chf DESC LIMIT 15;

panels.title: Top products by revenue

panels.description: Order volume over the selected range, split by terminal status.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, $__interval),
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'pending')::bigint AS pending,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'paid')::bigint AS paid,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'cancelled')::bigint AS cancelled,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'refunded')::bigint AS refunded
FROM "order"
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Orders by status over time

panels.description: Most recent cancelled or refunded orders in the selected range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT created_at, status::text AS status, (total_cents / 100.0)::numeric(12,2) AS chf, origin::text AS origin FROM "order" WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND status IN ('cancelled', 'refunded') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;

panels.title: Recent cancellations & refunds

panels.description: Absolute net inventory movement per product today (Europe/Zurich). Highlights fast movers.

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.name AS product, ABS(SUM(il.delta))::bigint AS movement FROM inventory_ledger il JOIN product p ON p.id = il.product_id WHERE il.created_at >= (date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Zurich') AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Zurich') GROUP BY p.name HAVING ABS(SUM(il.delta)) > 0 ORDER BY movement DESC LIMIT 10;

panels.title: Inventory movement today

panels.description: Per-app HTTP request rate (Azure Monitor `Requests` metric).
panels.title: Request rate per app

panels.description: Top 15 routes by request count over the selected time range. Parses `path` from backend logs.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where ContainerAppName_s startswith "backend-"
| extend path = extract(@'"path"\s*[:=]\s*"([^"]+)"', 1, Log_s)
| where isnotempty(path)
| summarize requests = count() by path
| top 15 by requests desc

panels.title: Top routes by requests

panels.description: Request share per container app over the selected time range.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(ContainerAppName_s)
| extend status = toint(extract(@'"status"\s*[:=]\s*(\d+)', 1, Log_s))
| where isnotnull(status)
| summarize requests = count() by ContainerAppName_s
| order by requests desc

panels.title: Requests by app

panels.description: p50 / p95 / p99 backend latency. Parses `latency_ms` from backend logs.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where ContainerAppName_s startswith "backend-"
| extend latency_ms = todouble(extract(@'"latency_ms"\s*[:=]\s*([\d\.]+)', 1, Log_s))
| where isnotnull(latency_ms)
| summarize p50 = percentile(latency_ms, 50), p95 = percentile(latency_ms, 95), p99 = percentile(latency_ms, 99) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__timeInterval)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Backend latency p50 / p95 / p99

panels.description: Routes ranked by p95 latency over the selected window. Parses `path` and `latency_ms` from backend logs.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where ContainerAppName_s startswith "backend-"
| extend path = extract(@'"path"\s*[:=]\s*"([^"]+)"', 1, Log_s)
| extend latency_ms = todouble(extract(@'"latency_ms"\s*[:=]\s*([\d\.]+)', 1, Log_s))
| where isnotnull(latency_ms) and isnotempty(path)
| summarize p95_ms = percentile(latency_ms, 95), requests = count() by path
| where requests >= 5
| top 10 by p95_ms desc

panels.title: Slowest routes (p95)

panels.description: Status code buckets over time. Parses `status` from backend logs.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where ContainerAppName_s startswith "backend-"
| extend status = toint(extract(@'"status"\s*[:=]\s*(\d+)', 1, Log_s))
| where isnotnull(status)
| extend bucket = case(status >= 500, "5xx", status >= 400, "4xx", status >= 300, "3xx", status >= 200, "2xx", "other")
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, $__timeInterval), bucket
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Status codes over time

panels.description: Top routes by 4xx/5xx count. Parses `path` and `status` from backend logs.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where ContainerAppName_s startswith "backend-"
| extend status = toint(extract(@'"status"\s*[:=]\s*(\d+)', 1, Log_s))
| extend path = extract(@'"path"\s*[:=]\s*"([^"]+)"', 1, Log_s)
| where status >= 400 and isnotempty(path)
| summarize errors = count() by path, status
| top 20 by errors desc

panels.title: Top error routes

panels.description: Average CPU usage vs a 1 vCPU (1e9 nanocores) ceiling. Thresholds at 50% / 75% / 90%.
panels.title: CPU (vs 1 vCPU)

panels.description: Working set vs 2 GiB ceiling. Thresholds at 60% / 80% / 90%.
panels.title: Memory (vs 2 GiB)

panels.description: Replica count over time with threshold line at the scale ceiling (20).
panels.title: Replicas

panels.description: Container restart count in the selected window. Non-zero means pods are restarting — investigate.
panels.title: Restart count

panels.description: Unresolved Sentry issues for the selected environment, sorted by frequency.
panels.title: Top Sentry issues (by frequency)
